programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Edmond locates Gaston, Villefort's illegitimate child, who has grown up to be a thief; Danglars discovers Fernand's treacherous deeds in Algeria and reveals all to the press.

programme.title: Henry David Thoreau
programme.desc: Henry David Thoreau pursues a career as an author, retreating to a cabin in the woods to live simply and write.

programme.title: Henry David Thoreau
programme.desc: Thoreau finds solace in nature and writes two books at Walden Pond; over his two-year stay, an expedition to Maine and an act of civil disobedience protesting slavery reshape his idea of freedom.

programme.title: Henry David Thoreau
programme.desc: Thoreau returns to society, taking on roles as surveyor, scientist and abolitionist, and makes two more Maine trips; Thoreau writes with renewed energy as he faces a lifelong illness.

programme.title: Change Your Brain, Change Your Pain With Daniel Amen, MD
programme.desc: Dr. Daniel Amen maps the brain networks that drive physical and emotional pain and reveals his practical, brain-based strategies that help you feel better, think clearer and live more fully.

programme.title: Rick Steves Mighty Alps
programme.desc: Rick Steves takes a European alpine adventure from Italy to Austria and Switzerland to France; locations include the Dolomites, Zugspitze, Matterhorn, Aiguille du Midi and the Tour du Mont Blanc hiking path.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Chicken Pox; Sick as a Dog
programme.desc: Arthur gets chicken pox just as the circus comes to town; Arthur blames D.W. for making his dog sick.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.sub-title: Oscar of All Trades; Swamps 'N' Gators
programme.desc: Oscar recalls his early days at Odd Squad; Olive and Otto are trapped inside a board game.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin wants to check out insects, while Chris would rather investigate the spider monkey.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The kids learn what colors make up a rainbow just in time for a Mother's Day surprise.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: Finding a New Friend; Lyla Bugs Out
programme.desc: Lyla and her sisters find a lost bag's owner; Lyla gets jealous when Ale gets attention.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: A Collection to Get Rid of; The Button Collection
programme.desc: Carl and his friends clean up the Fuzzytown Park; Carl accidentally breaks the birthday present Sheldon planned to give his mom.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Daniel's Tiger Twirl; You Can Play Your Own Way
programme.desc: Miss Elaina shows off her cartwheel at the carnival, prompting Daniel to try it, too.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.sub-title: Birthday Dance Surprise; The Green Pepper
programme.desc: Phoebe plans a birthday surprise for Grandma; Phoebe and Jay must tend to the bell pepper in the garden.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Rudy feels angry when Abby asks him to share his toys, so his friends make a movie to show that sharing can be fun.

programme.sub-title: Sammys Primmo; Sammy Makes a Day
programme.desc: Sammy and Benito find a way to communicate; Sammy makes plans for his mom's visit.

programme.title: Let's Learn
programme.sub-title: What Sounds Do You Hear in More?
programme.desc: Learning to dance with Mr. Met; making a collage of an animal; reading "Woodpecker Girl"; learning r-controlled vowels or and ore.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: The kids learn about crying as they set out on an adventure to help Miri; the kids and Mr. Bat look for Ari's ball after it goes missing in a cave.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.sub-title: If You Can't Stand the Heat
programme.desc: The CyberSquad tries to keep cool as a heat wave sweeps through the cybersite during the annual Factoria Flower Show.

programme.title: Molly of Denali
programme.desc: A family of beavers builds a dam that accidentally diverts water into Trini's garden, threatening her strawberries; Trini is determined to earn the Night Watchers Badge.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am Rukmini Devi; I Am Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rukmini Devi reminds Xavier and Yadina why their annual family walk is special; Bob Ross shows Yadina that a small blunder can be a happy accident.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.sub-title: Triple Chocolate Truffle Treat With David Ogonowski
programme.desc: David Ogonowski makes crispy cocoa cookies, chocolate truffle tartlets and chocolate waves.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Nathan installs bypass doors for a pantry; Richard tests different smart automatic water shutoff valves; Ross explores asphalt roof shingles that can reflect some of the sun's heat.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An Andrew Clemens sand bottle circa 1885; a 1933 Goudey baseball card set 239/240; a Joan Miró pencil on paper circa 1965.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: BBC News The Context
programme.desc: A regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discuss the biggest international stories of the day.

programme.title: NJ Spotlight News with Briana Vannozzi
programme.desc: Statewide reporting on the latest news and issues affecting communities across the Garden State.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: Presenting a round-up of the most recent news and developments from across the world.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: A detailed look into news stories from around the world from the BBC news desk in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1960 Ansel Adams Portfolio III: Yosemite Valley; a Persian Qashqai Gabbeh rug circa 1935; 1959 JFK's boxer shorts with signed photo.

programme.title: The American Revolution
programme.desc: The French-American alliance changes the war and moves it to other theaters; navies battle off England and in the Caribbean, while armies advance in Indian Country and the South; the British take Charleston.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: One on One With Steve Adubato
programme.desc: Professionals and innovators share their experiences.

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A new cohort of junior doctors join the midwives, including Timothy, who observes the contrast between clinical medicine and compassionate care at Nonnatus House; Violet announces her plan to shadow the midwives.

programme.title: MaryLand on Masterpiece
programme.desc: When sisters Becca and Rosaline receive shocking news about their mother, they fly to the Isle of Man to find out more and are reunited in their sorrow after years of distance.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Edmond locates Gaston, Villefort's illegitimate child, who has grown up to be a thief; Danglars discovers Fernand's treacherous deeds in Algeria and reveals all to the press.

programme.title: A Life Reimagined: The George Masa Story
programme.desc: Unraveling the mysterious life of George Masa, a Japanese immigrant whose photographs helped define the identity of the Great Smoky Mountains.

programme.desc: Lyla and Luke create and act out variations on a fairy tale; Lyla, Louis and Stu track down a lost package.

programme.desc: Nico and Arugula start a hamster sitter business; Carl is afraid to tell his Mama that his new shoes hurt his feet.

programme.desc: Making rhythmic body sounds; adding using an open number line; reading "Thinker: My Puppy Poet and Me"; practicing r-controlled vowels.

programme.title: Rick Steves Art of Europe: Michelangelo to Monet
programme.desc: Celebrating Europe's art and creative geniuses, from Leonardo Da Vinci to Vincent van Gogh; Florence's bold "rebirth" after Europe's medieval struggles; impressionist works of the late 1800s.
